About.title: About Us
About.description1: Kaloudis is a well-known florist in the Ilioupoli area, offering a wide variety of flowers and plants suitable for every occasion. We emphasize high aesthetic quality and excellent customer service.
About.description2: We provide floral decoration services for weddings, baptisms and receptions, creating original compositions. We also offer a rich collection of indoor and outdoor plants, as well as complete landscaping services.
About.qualityDesc: Service with a smile, honesty and dedication to every customer
About.varietyDesc: From fresh cut flowers to rare plants and carnivorous species

weddings.title: Wedding Decorations
weddings.heroDescription: We create unique wedding floral arrangements that transform any venue into a fairytale setting. From the church to the reception, every detail is designed with love.
weddings.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS in Ilioupoli, we specialize in wedding decoration with fresh flowers and original compositions that reflect each couple's personal style. We handle complete church floral decoration — from the wedding candles and crowns to the entrance and altar arrangements. We serve weddings at churches and reception venues in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, and throughout Attica.
weddings.content2: The bridal bouquet is one of the most important elements of your special day. We create bouquets in every style — romantic, modern, boho, or classic — using the finest seasonal flowers. Each composition is handcrafted with attention to detail and color harmony.
weddings.content3: Reception decoration includes table centerpieces, wish table arrangements, candy bar decoration, and decorative accents throughout the venue. We design every detail to create a cohesive aesthetic that will impress your guests. We collaborate with the finest reception venues in Glyfada, Alimos, Nea Smyrni, and across south Athens.
weddings.content4: Our extensive experience in wedding floral decoration allows us to adapt to any budget without compromising on quality. We offer free consultations at our shop in Ilioupoli, where you can view samples, choose your color palette, and design your dream wedding decoration together.
weddings.feature1Desc: Complete church floral arrangement with candles, crowns, altar compositions, and entrance decoration
weddings.feature2Desc: Handcrafted bridal bouquets in every style, from classic to contemporary
weddings.feature3Desc: Table centerpieces, wish table, candy bar, and decorative elements throughout the venue
weddings.feature4Desc: Free consultation and personalized proposals tailored to every taste and budget
weddings.faq1Question: How far in advance should I book my wedding decoration?
weddings.faq1Answer: We recommend booking at least 3-4 months before your wedding, especially during the summer season. This gives us enough time to design the perfect arrangement and secure the flowers you desire.
weddings.faq2Question: Do you decorate churches and venues outside Ilioupoli?
weddings.faq2Answer: Absolutely! We serve weddings throughout Attica — Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, Glyfada, Alimos, Nea Smyrni, and many more areas. Delivery and setup are handled by our team.
weddings.faq3Question: What does a complete wedding decoration package include?
weddings.faq3Answer: A complete package includes church decoration (candles, crowns, altar, entrance), the bridal bouquet, reception venue decoration (centerpieces, wish table), and delivery with setup. Prices are tailored to your specific needs.

baptisms.title: Baptism Decorations
baptisms.heroDescription: We create joyful and elegant baptism decorations that make this special day even more magical. Every arrangement is crafted with care and love.
baptisms.content1: A baptism is one of the most important moments in a family's life, and at Kaloudis in Ilioupoli we ensure that the decoration is perfect in every detail. We handle complete baptism decoration — church floral arrangements, baptismal font decoration, candle decoration, and stunning compositions for the church entrance.
baptisms.content2: Baptism reception decoration includes table centerpieces, sweet table and candy buffet decoration, as well as special constructions with balloons and flowers. We serve baptisms at churches and reception venues in Ilioupoli, Dafni, Vyronas, Argyroupoli, Nea Smyrni, and throughout south Athens.
baptisms.content3: We customize every decoration to match your chosen baptism theme — prince, princess, animals, flowers, nautical, or whatever you dream of. Our team at ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS combines fresh flowers with decorative elements for a harmonious and unique result.
baptisms.content4: We offer free consultations at our shop in Ilioupoli, where you can view photos of previous work, choose colors and themes, and receive a detailed quote. Every baptism is unique and treated with the same dedication.
baptisms.feature1Desc: Baptismal font decoration, church entrance and interior arrangements with fresh flowers and accents
baptisms.feature2Desc: Stunning baptism candle decoration with flowers, ribbons, and themed elements
baptisms.feature3Desc: Table arrangements, candy buffet, sweet table, and special constructions
baptisms.feature4Desc: Full customization to match your baptism theme with flowers and decorative elements combined
baptisms.faq1Question: Can you create a baptism decoration with a specific theme?
baptisms.faq1Answer: Yes, we customize every decoration to match your chosen theme. Whether it's animals, flowers, nautical, or something completely original, we create arrangements that perfectly match your aesthetic vision.
baptisms.faq2Question: How much does a baptism decoration cost?
baptisms.faq2Answer: The cost depends on the type of decoration, the flowers you choose, and the venue. We offer free cost estimates after a consultation at our shop in Ilioupoli, where we discuss your needs in detail.
baptisms.faq3Question: Do you handle delivery and setup?
baptisms.faq3Answer: Of course! Our team handles complete delivery, setup, and takedown of the decoration. We serve churches and reception venues in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Dafni, Vyronas, Glyfada, and throughout Attica.

gardenDesign.title: Garden Study & Design
gardenDesign.heroDescription: We design the garden of your dreams with professional study, 3D visualization, and complete construction. From concept to completion.
gardenDesign.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS in Ilioupoli, we offer comprehensive garden study and design services for residential and commercial properties. The process begins with an on-site inspection, assessment of your needs, and analysis of soil and climate conditions. We serve clients in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, Alimos, Glyfada, and throughout Attica.
gardenDesign.content2: Our garden study includes an architectural planting plan, selection of suitable plants for your space's climate and orientation, pathway design, relaxation areas, and lighting layout. We use modern 3D visualization tools so you can see your garden before construction begins.
gardenDesign.content3: We also handle complete garden construction — excavation, soil preparation, planting, automatic irrigation installation, lawn laying, and rock garden construction. Our experience guarantees results you'll enjoy for years to come.
gardenDesign.content4: Every garden we design considers sustainability, water conservation, and low maintenance. We select plants adapted to the Mediterranean climate and design efficient irrigation systems. Visit our shop in Ilioupoli to discuss the garden you've been dreaming of.
gardenDesign.feature1Desc: Complete garden plan with space mapping, plant selection, and landscape design
gardenDesign.feature2Desc: Three-dimensional visualization of your garden before construction for an ideal result
gardenDesign.feature3Desc: Full implementation — planting, lawn, pathways, lighting, and irrigation
gardenDesign.feature4Desc: Mediterranean plant selection, water conservation, and low-maintenance design approach
gardenDesign.faq1Question: What does a garden study include?
gardenDesign.faq1Answer: The study includes an on-site inspection, architectural planting plan, plant selection, pathway and lighting design, 3D visualization, and a detailed budget. We deliver a complete file with all plans and specifications.
gardenDesign.faq2Question: How much does garden design cost?
gardenDesign.faq2Answer: The cost depends on the size of the space and your requirements. The initial inspection and consultation are free. After that, we provide a detailed quote for both the study and construction phases.
gardenDesign.faq3Question: Do you offer maintenance after construction?
gardenDesign.faq3Answer: Yes! We offer comprehensive garden maintenance services after construction — regular pruning, fertilizing, irrigation checks, and plant protection. This keeps your garden in perfect condition year-round.

maintenance.title: Garden Maintenance
maintenance.heroDescription: We keep your garden in perfect condition year-round with regular care and professional maintenance services.
maintenance.content1: The Kaloudis team in Ilioupoli handles regular garden maintenance for gardens, balconies, and outdoor spaces in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Dafni, Vyronas, Alimos, and throughout south Athens. Our services include lawn mowing, plant pruning, fertilizing, plant protection spraying, and irrigation system checks.
maintenance.content2: We offer flexible maintenance programs — weekly, bi-weekly, or monthly care — tailored to your garden's needs and your budget. Every visit includes a plant health check and seasonal tasks to keep everything thriving.
maintenance.feature1Desc: Weekly or monthly maintenance including lawn mowing, pruning, and cleanup
maintenance.feature2Desc: Seasonal fertilizing and spraying for healthy and vibrant plants
maintenance.feature3Desc: Regular inspection and adjustment of automatic irrigation systems
maintenance.faq1Question: How often does my garden need maintenance?
maintenance.faq1Answer: It depends on the type of garden and the season. Generally, we recommend at least two visits per month during summer and one during winter to keep everything in top shape.
maintenance.faq2Question: Do you maintain apartment building gardens?
maintenance.faq2Answer: Yes, we serve both private gardens and shared apartment building spaces in Ilioupoli and surrounding areas. We offer special rates for long-term maintenance contracts.

irrigation.title: Automatic Irrigation Systems
irrigation.heroDescription: We design and install modern automatic irrigation systems that save water and time while keeping your garden perfectly watered.
irrigation.content1: At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS, we design and install automatic irrigation systems for gardens, balcony planters, lawns, and indoor plants. We serve residential and commercial properties in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, Nea Smyrni, Glyfada, and throughout south Athens.
irrigation.content2: We use quality materials from leading brands (Hunter, Rain Bird) and next-generation controllers with smartphone control capabilities. Every system is designed for maximum water savings and uniform distribution across your garden.
irrigation.feature1Desc: Design and installation of automatic irrigation with drip lines, sprinklers, or spray nozzles
irrigation.feature2Desc: Regular maintenance, winterization, and prompt repair of any issues
irrigation.feature3Desc: Installation of smart controllers with mobile app control for convenient management
irrigation.faq1Question: How much does automatic irrigation installation cost?
irrigation.faq1Answer: The cost depends on the size of the area, the number of irrigation zones, and the type of system. We offer free on-site inspections and detailed quotes tailored to your needs.
irrigation.faq2Question: Can it be installed in an existing garden?
irrigation.faq2Answer: Absolutely! We install irrigation systems in both new and existing gardens with minimal disruption to current plantings. Our team ensures a clean installation every time.

pruning.title: Pruning Services
pruning.heroDescription: Professional tree and shrub pruning for health, safety, and aesthetics in your garden throughout south Athens.
pruning.content1: The Kaloudis team handles professional pruning of trees, shrubs, and plants in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Dafni, Vyronas, and surrounding areas. Proper pruning is essential for plant health, creating the right canopy shape, and improving flowering and fruit production.
pruning.content2: We perform shaping, thinning, rejuvenation, and sanitary pruning. Every job is carried out by experienced staff with professional tools, following the correct pruning guidelines for each plant species.
pruning.feature1Desc: Shaping, canopy thinning, and removal of dead or hazardous branches
pruning.feature2Desc: Shaping of shrubs and hedges for a neat and tidy appearance
pruning.feature3Desc: Correct pruning timing for each plant species to achieve optimal results
pruning.faq1Question: When is the best time for pruning?
pruning.faq1Answer: It depends on the plant species. Most deciduous trees are pruned in winter, while evergreen shrubs can be pruned at various times. Our team will guide you on the best timing for each plant.
pruning.faq2Answer: Yes, our service includes complete cleanup and removal of all branches after pruning. We leave your property clean and tidy every time.

tallTrees.title: Tall Tree Cutting
tallTrees.heroDescription: Safe cutting and removal of tall or hazardous trees with specialized equipment and experienced crew in south Athens.
tallTrees.content1: Tall tree cutting requires specialized equipment, experience, and proper planning. At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS in Ilioupoli, we have the right equipment and trained personnel for tall tree cutting in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, Alimos, and throughout south Athens.
tallTrees.content2: We handle tree cutting in difficult locations — near buildings, electrical cables, or tight spaces — using controlled felling techniques. Safety is always our top priority on every job.
tallTrees.feature1Desc: Controlled cutting of tall trees with specialized equipment and safety techniques
tallTrees.feature2Desc: Full removal of trunks, branches, and foliage from your property
tallTrees.feature3Desc: Specialization in cutting near buildings, cables, and confined spaces
tallTrees.faq1Question: Do I need a permit to cut a tree?
tallTrees.faq1Answer: In some cases, yes. Depending on the municipality and the type of tree, a cutting permit may be required. We inform you about the process and help with the necessary documentation.
tallTrees.faq2Question: How much does it cost to cut a tall tree?
tallTrees.faq2Answer: The price depends on the tree's height, access difficulty, and the equipment required. We offer free on-site inspections and detailed quotes for every job.

rockGardens.title: Rock Gardens
rockGardens.heroDescription: We design and build stunning rock gardens that add character and natural beauty to your outdoor space.
rockGardens.content1: A rock garden is an excellent solution for sloped areas, poor soil, or for those who want a low-maintenance garden with Mediterranean character. At Kaloudis in Ilioupoli, we design and build rock gardens in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, and throughout south Athens.
rockGardens.content2: We use natural rocks, gravel, and drought-resistant plants — lavender, thyme, rosemary, sedum, agave, and many more. Each rock garden is unique, designed to blend harmoniously with your landscape.
rockGardens.feature1Desc: Complete study with rock selection, plant choices, and terrain shaping
rockGardens.feature2Desc: Rock placement, terrain shaping, planting, and irrigation system installation
rockGardens.feature3Desc: Hardy Mediterranean plants that require minimal watering and care
rockGardens.faq1Question: Does a rock garden need watering?
rockGardens.faq1Answer: Very little! The plants we use are drought-resistant. We typically install a simple drip irrigation system for the first few months, after which the plants become self-sufficient.
rockGardens.faq2Question: What spaces are suitable for a rock garden?
rockGardens.faq2Answer: Rock gardens work in courtyards, gardens, rooftops, and balconies. They're ideal for sloped areas or poor soil quality, as well as modern architectural settings.

landClearing.title: Land Clearing
landClearing.heroDescription: We handle complete clearing and preparation of vacant lots, undeveloped land, and abandoned gardens in south Athens.
landClearing.content1: Land clearing is essential for both fire protection and aesthetics. At ANTHI-FYTA KALOUDIS in Ilioupoli, we handle land clearing for vacant lots and undeveloped spaces in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Vyronas, Dafni, and south Athens. The work includes vegetation removal, grass cutting, and removal of debris and branches.
landClearing.content2: We also offer post-clearing preparation services — ground leveling, planting, and irrigation installation. We transform abandoned plots into clean, safe, and green spaces ready for use.
landClearing.feature1Desc: Grass cutting, weed removal, and cleanup of debris and rubble from your property
landClearing.feature2Desc: Land clearing in compliance with fire protection regulations and deadlines
landClearing.feature3Desc: Ground leveling, planting, and transformation of vacant lots into functional gardens
landClearing.faq1Answer: Yes, according to current Greek legislation, property owners are required to clear their lots by the end of May each year for fire protection purposes. Failure to comply can result in fines.
landClearing.faq2Answer: Yes, we handle plots of all sizes. We have the right equipment for small urban lots as well as larger properties across south Athens and Attica.

pestControl.title: Pest Control & Spraying
pestControl.heroDescription: We protect your plants from diseases and pests with professional spraying services in collaboration with a specialized agronomist.
pestControl.content1: At Kaloudis in Ilioupoli, we provide plant protection services — spraying, treatments, and pest control — in collaboration with a specialized agronomist. We treat fungal diseases, aphids, scale insects, mites, psyllids, and all types of pests. We serve gardens, courtyards, and parks in Ilioupoli, Argyroupoli, Dafni, Vyronas, and throughout south Athens.
pestControl.content2: We use approved plant protection products that are safe for humans, pets, and the environment. Our agronomist evaluates the problem and applies targeted treatment for maximum effectiveness and minimal environmental impact.
pestControl.feature1Desc: Assessment by a specialized agronomist and identification of the problem
pestControl.feature2Desc: Targeted spraying with approved products for effective pest control
pestControl.feature3Desc: Seasonal preventive spraying to avoid diseases and pest infestations
pestControl.faq1Question: Are the products you use safe?
pestControl.faq1Answer: Yes, we exclusively use approved plant protection products that are safe for humans, pets, and beneficial insects. Our agronomist always selects the least toxic solution available.
pestControl.faq2Answer: The frequency depends on the problem. Preventive spraying is done seasonally (2-3 times per year), while therapeutic treatment may require repeated applications over several weeks.
